title: Test thumbnails command
description: Write tests in tests/test_thumbnails.py covering the full pipeline (mocked subprocesses), multi-file splitting boundary conditions, hidden slide placeholder insertion, --plain output format, and all three missing-dependency error paths.
acceptance_criteria: Tests verify a small deck produces JSON output listing thumbnails.jpg
Tests verify --cols and --output options propagate correctly
Tests verify multi-file output when slide count equals and exceeds cols × (cols + 1)
Tests verify hidden slide positions contain placeholder images rather than real renders
Tests verify missing Pillow produces correct stderr message and non-zero exit
Tests verify missing soffice produces correct stderr message and non-zero exit
Tests verify missing pdftoppm produces correct stderr message and non-zero exit
